sql: SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at FROM users WHERE status = #{status} AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{namePattern}, '%') AND id IN (#{ids[0]}, #{ids[1]}, ...) ORDER BY ${sortField} LIMIT #{limit}
templateSql:
SELECT <include refid="BaseColumns"/> FROM users
<where>
    <if test="status != null">
        AND status = #{status}
    </if>
    <if test="namePattern != null">
        AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{namePattern}, '%')
    </if>
    <if test="ids != null and ids.size() > 0">
        AND id IN
        <foreach collection="ids" item="id" open="(" separator="," close=")">
            #{id}
        </foreach>
    </if>
</where>
<if test="sortField != null">
    ORDER BY ${sortField}
</if>
<if test="limit != null">
    LIMIT #{limit}
</if>
